_comment: Add your own companies here. They are merged with the built-in registry at runtime.
_instructions: greenhouse: slug = the board name from boards.greenhouse.io/YOUR_SLUG
lever:      slug = the company slug from jobs.lever.co/YOUR_SLUG
ashby:      slug = the company slug from jobs.ashbyhq.com/YOUR_SLUG
smartrecruiters: slug = the company id from jobs.smartrecruiters.com/YOUR_SLUG (case-sensitive)
direct:     slug = full careers page URL (best-effort HTML scrape)
industries: list of tags — used by --industry filter (e.g. 'health_informatics', 'controls_engineering')
If a company name matches one already in the built-in registry, your entry overrides it.

companies._example: Greenhouse company — remove _example key when using
companies.name: Example Greenhouse Co
